build_reproducibility.details: Fresh clone built with node build.js html. Diff vs committed: 1 line changed — date stamp in ds-meta paragraph (May 11 → May 12). This is expected; the build date updates to today on every build. Not a data integrity problem. Previous run (2026-05-11) correctly tracked this as ISS-1944 but that mapping appears incorrect — ISS-1944 is actually a WIN-013 DOI citation issue. Build drift finding has no tracked ISS; creating new finding with tracked_under null.

issues_found.description: EXP-317 and EXP-318 have output files in monitor/analyst/expansions/ but no tracker entry in either live items[] or expansion-tracker-archive.jsonl. These appear to be analyst outputs from yesterday's M1 sweep (EXP-317..322 dispatched) that were written without being registered. item_id=EXP-317 targets SEC-4.2.2/EXP-275 ISS-1807 verification; item_id=EXP-318 is a related verification file. Decider cannot integrate these without tracker entries.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Analyst or decider should add EXP-317 and EXP-318 entries to expansion-tracker.json live items[] with status=completed and the correct output_file path, then ensure decider picks them up for integration.

issues_found.description: EXP-294, EXP-295, EXP-296 files exist in monitor/analyst/expansions/ but have no tracker entries (live or archive). These predate the archive but were not included in it, likely from a tracker write that was lost or predates the current tracking schema. EXP-294/295 use item_id format consistent with current schema. Note: ISS-1922 references EXP-295 by name, suggesting the content was integrated, so these may be no_output_file_reason eligible if the integration was direct.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Verify whether EXP-294/295/296 content was already integrated into sections.json or wins.json. If integrated, add archive entries with no_output_file_reason='integrated_direct'. If not integrated, add live tracker entries for follow-up.

issues_found.description: Build from clean clone produces 1-line diff vs committed docs/index.html: date stamp in ds-meta paragraph changes from 'May 11, 2026' to 'May 12, 2026'. This is expected behavior — the build date updates on every build run. Not a data integrity issue.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Expected. Runs that trigger build.js publish will keep this current. No action needed.

summary: Site passes all structural checks. test.js: 3604/3604 pass. Build reproducibility: clean (1-line date stamp diff, expected). External data source links: all 8 checked return HTTP 200. Discoverability infrastructure complete (llms.txt current at 71 WINs, sitemap valid, meta tags present). No broken curmudgeon review files; 4 unprocessed reviews within normal lag. Drift audit refreshed (was 76.1h stale): 17 curmudgeon review candidates queued (5 verdict-changed, 8 large-rewrite, 4 tldr-only). The two moderate findings are expansion tracker integrity issues: EXP-317 and EXP-318 have output files but no tracker entries (likely from yesterday's M1 sweep analyst dispatch — decider cannot integrate them without tracker entries), and EXP-294/295/296 are untracked legacy files that may already be integrated. No critical issues. No direction-violation boundary crossing. Pipeline health: nominal.
